caption_text: Six verbs, one object · write mints, read observes

cards.dims_superseded: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: hand-file width citations are ceilings — cards solve to their own ink + anchor pads; the hand file's wider cards are dress history

census_amendments.note: glyph_marks 5->7: verify's bare checkmark (uncounted hand path) counts as its check mark, and the crown carries the verb-algebra family diamond the sheet nucleus draws.

hub_seats_superseded.compose: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: the satellite solves to its own ink, moving the name-run seat ~8-9% inside the hand file's wide-card throw
hub_seats_superseded.diff: edge-run law 2026-07-14 (polar): S seats re-derive from the hand file's spread-to-drop family (0.87 x the 245 gap) — card CENTERS match the hand ±0.5px, but the snug cards + snug crown move the NAME-anchor polar read this law measures
